data.body: Bot-psychologist investigation: Hypothesis confirmed via code analysis (Positional Bias #11 + missing negative directive). 'One question at a time' rule exists in brainstorm/onboarding Socratic dialogue sections but NOT at AskUserQuestion escalation call sites. Highest-risk sites: retro/SKILL.md:58, design-wireframe/SKILL.md:790, preplanning/SKILL.md (no Guardrails section). Fix: add explicit negative directive at AskUserQuestion escalation sites. Experiment needed to confirm model behavior (deferred — requires interactive session to run closed-book test).
